value.found_quote: You can run Codex as an MCP server and connect it from other MCP clients (for example, an agent built with the OpenAI Agents SDK MCP integration).
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes and documents "Running Codex as an MCP server" as a feature, providing the command to start it (`codex mcp-server`), details of the two tools it exposes (`codex` and `codex-reply`), and full example code for connecting MCP clients to it. This directly substantiates the claim that Codex can run as a Model Context Protocol server that other MCP clients can connect to. The feature appears to be generally available (active), with no mention of preview or beta status.
